channel.title: releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Important We try our best to have security releases of Drupal Core within 24-72 hours of being made available on drupal.org. The following table is a list of all the releases that are housed under the DrupalWxT organization on GitHub. Release Created Date Description 4.0.4 2021-04-22T17:30:03Z Features / Updates: Updates for Drupal Core SA-core-2021-003 Updates for Contrib Update ctools to to 3.
